summary: Successfully created git-substrate-sync skill with push (va-side) and pull (zoputer-side) functionality. Integrates with content-classifier for Tier 0 filtering, handles git operations safely with conflict detection, includes comprehensive CLI with dry-run support, and provides audit logging capabilities.
learnings: Content-classifier integration requires sys.path.insert for proper import handling
build_manifest() and classify_path() are the key functions for Tier 0 skill detection
Git operations should always work in /tmp to avoid workspace pollution
Both push and pull scripts need standalone operation for deployment flexibility

integration_notes.content_classifier: Uses scan.classify_path() and build_manifest() for Tier 0 filtering
integration_notes.librarian_export: Can be called by librarian-export after bundling
integration_notes.consulting_api: Provides git layer for higher-level transmission logic
integration_notes.standalone_operation: pull.py works independently on zoputer without va dependencies

deployment_ready.va_side: Scripts ready for integration with librarian-export
deployment_ready.zoputer_side: pull.py is standalone and deployable to zoputer
deployment_ready.configuration: Uses environment variables for GITHUB_TOKEN and repo URL
